# CWE-1220 vulnerable: coarse role gate on all records
lang: go
file: CWE-1220-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1220: Insufficient Granularity of Access Control.
// Vulnerable: any authenticated user may read any invoice by numeric id.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type Invoice struct {
	ID     int     `db:"id"`
	Owner  int     `db:"owner_id"`
	Amount float64 `db:"amount"`
}

func GetInvoice(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		if c.GetHeader("Authorization") == "" {
			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "login required"})
			return
		}
		id := c.Param("id")
		var inv Invoice
		err := db.Get(&inv, "SELECT id, owner_id, amount FROM invoices WHERE id = $1", id)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "not found"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, inv)
	}
}
